title: I’m a Deals Writer, and These Are My Top 10 Tech Deals This Week
summary: If you’ve never owned a Garmin watch and want to try one out, now is a good time : The best budget Garmin for runners, the Garmin Forerunner 55 , is down to its lowest price ever—$129 (originally $199.99).
